vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="880" x="360" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="browser" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=12;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;align=left;spacing=8;" value="<div align="center"><b>User Browser</b><br></div><b><br>Leave Calculation Page<br>- Start process<br>- Receive calculationId<br>- Connect to RealtimeHub<br>- Show realtime progress<br>- Restore active calculation</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="250" x="235" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="web4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=12;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;align=left;spacing=8;" value="<div align="center"><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Web4</b></div><div align="center">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;ASP.NET Core MVC&nbsp; .NET 8</div><div align="left"><br><div><b>- Render UI</b><br><b>- Proxy API calls</b><br><b>- Handle restore flow</b></div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="255" x="232.5" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4XLVupsZJzZumL5gmwFz-5" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=12;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=14;align=left;spacing=8;" value="<div align="center"><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;Web4.Api</b></div><div align="center">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;ASP.NET Core Web API / .NET 8</div><b><br>- Create calculationId<br>- Run background process<br>- Save state/history<br>- Notify RealtimeHub<br>- Provide restore status</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="260" x="230" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xml" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=12;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=14;align=left;spacing=8;" value="<div align="center"><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4XLVupsZJzZumL5gmwFz-14" edge="1" parent="1" source="hub" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="match" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4XLVupsZJzZumL5gmwFz-15" connectable="0" parent="4XLVupsZJzZumL5gmwFz-14" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="Push SignalR" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0117" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hub" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=12;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=14;align=left;spacing=8;" value="<div align="center"><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; RealtimeHub</b><br><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; ASP.NET Core SignalR</b><br></div><b><br>- Validate page token<br>- Receive API notification<br>- Push realtime update<br>- Route to matching group</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="260" x="690" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="match" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=12;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;align=left;spacing=8;" value="<div align="center"><b>&nbsp;Matching Browser Page</b><br></div><b><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>(joined SignalR group)<br><br>- Receives realtime update</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="260" x="690" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="browser" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=12;" target="web4" value="HTTP request / response"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;fontSize=12;" target="hub" value="send notification"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="570" y="640" /> <mxPoint x="570" y="640" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=12;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;align=left;spacing=8;dashed=1;" value="<b>Important rule</b><br/>Web4.Api creates and returns calculationId first.<br/>After that, the browser connects to RealtimeHub and joins the private SignalR group for that specific calculation." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="410" x="550" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4XLVupsZJzZumL5gmwFz-1" parent="1" value="<font style="font-size: 12px;">Join group after <code data-start="176" data-end="191">calculationId</code> is returned</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

- Start process
- Receive calculationId
- Connect to RealtimeHub
- Show realtime progress
- Restore active calculation

div.div:
Important rule
Web4.Api creates and returns calculationId first.
After that, the browser connects to RealtimeHub and joins the private SignalR group for that specific calculation.
